items.prompt: A realistic editorial travel photograph at Masca-byn — 80 km / 1,5 tim i Teneriffa in Teneriffa, Spain, during the most relevant travel season for the scene. The scene clearly represents masca-byn — 80 km / 1,5 tim with realistisk ömiljö, vulkanisk natur, kust eller stad, människor i rörelse och tydliga platsdetaljer. Include natural human activity, realistic parked rental cars or traffic where appropriate, and boats only if the location is near the harbour or coast. Bright Mediterranean daylight, authentic architecture, true-to-life colors, detailed shadows, realistic scale, documentary travel photography style. No readable text, no fake signs, no logos, no watermark. Make it feel like a believable editorial travel photograph, not a glossy ad. Keep architecture, geography, light, people, traffic, and scale realistic for Teneriffa.
